name: FLS Community Commitments
description: FirstLine Schools Community Commitments with actionable behaviors

commitments.personal: I commit to my own and others' development.
commitments.collective: We commit to our own personal and collective learning. We give and seek the gift of feedback to help us solve our problems so we can all grow together.
behaviors: Seek opportunities to learn, develop, and grow (observe a co-teacher, book study, PD, visit another school in city, virtual PD) to enhance your skills as a professional.
Continually improve our practices and systems.
Give 5:1 ratio of positive feedback to students and adults.
Learn through problem solving and failings.

commitments.personal: I commit to listening and understanding.
commitments.collective: We believe all perspectives have meaning and help us make better decisions. We are all part of a whole; we leave no community member behind.
behaviors: Listen to learn with compassion and empathy before responding and be comfortable not responding right away.
Practice blameless problem solving.
Forgive when mistakes are made and provide support or development as needed (don't hold grudges).
Assume that people are always trying to do the right thing (even if they did not).
Be open to different perspectives; understand that everyone is on a journey of learning.

commitments.personal: I commit to speaking with honesty and respect.
commitments.collective: We commit to being clear, supportive and direct in our communications. We commit to speaking to each other, not about each other.
behaviors: Be kind in language and tone in all interactions, even when you are frustrated.
Give feedback constructively and with empathy.
Speak up against injustice or wrongdoing while maintaining professionalism and respect.

commitments.personal: I commit to doing what it takes to serve others.
commitments.collective: We commit to doing what it takes to serve our community by identifying and meeting what others need to understand, grow, and thrive.
behaviors: Offer support and assistance to others without hesitation.
Respond with flexibility, framing and problem-solving.
Take initiative to address challenges and solve problems proactively.
Address requests, questions, and concerns in a timely manner.

commitments.theme: We are the Safekeepers of our Community
commitments.personal: I commit to keeping myself and others safe in mind, body, and spirit.
commitments.collective: We commit to physical and emotional safety for ourselves and our community.
behaviors: Follow safety protocols and procedures to ensure physical safety.
Intervene appropriately in situations where safety is at risk.
Promote mental and emotional well-being by creating a supportive and nurturing environment.
Create safe, organized, and beautiful environments for students, staff and families.
Take care of yourself by practicing healthy habits, stress management and self-reflection.

commitments.personal: I commit to bringing my personal joy to our work.
commitments.collective: We celebrate together, create together, and share experiences that build our community and make us happy.
behaviors: Approach tasks and interactions with enthusiasm and positivity.
Share successes and celebrate achievements.
Express gratitude for little and big things to students, teacher, families, and colleagues and others.
Show genuine care and understanding towards colleagues, which can help to build strong, joyful relationships.

commitments.personal: I commit to holding myself and others accountable.
commitments.collective: We believe in each other, set high expectations, and hold each other accountable to reach them. We celebrate our progress as a community by showing our results. Together we will reach our goals.
behaviors: Set clear, measurable goals that are both aspirational and achievable.
Regularly review progress towards goals and collaborate on how to improve.
Take personal responsibility for results.
Acknowledge, own, correct, and learn from our mistakes.
